description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, supported by a circular pedestal stand. The front features a large, rectangular screen with a thin, matte black bezel framing the display area, which shows a desktop wallpaper and various icons. The monitor's body is slim, with a consistent thickness from top to bottom, and the rear is plain with no visible ports or branding. The stand is a solid, round base connected to the monitor by a short, rectangular neck, providing stability. No physical buttons, ports, or logos are visible on any side of the monitor. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for office or home desk environments.
description: A slim, widescreen computer monitor with a matte black bezel and a circular pedestal stand, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen display, thin black bezel, and visible desktop wallpaper with icons.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the monitor's slim depth and the circular base of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thinness and the round stand base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, with sharp corners and no visible texture or decorative elements, providing a clean and modern frame around the display.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base made of solid black material, connected to the monitor by a short, rectangular neck; it appears sturdy but has no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
